subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! That which ye had written was noted; from the gardens of its meanings wafted a sweet fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملحوظ افتاد از حدائق معانیش نفحه خوش
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @education of children; moral education, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
